`global_budget_utilization_hash = H(ns_cgbutil, budget_domain_id, utilization_policy_seq, attester_policy_seq, accountability_policy_seq, adjudication_policy_seq, sorted(tuple(artifact_class, utilization_window_id, attestation_projection_key, reconciliation_projection_key, rotation_projection_key, continuity_projection_key, accountability_projection_key, reinstatement_projection_key, adjudication_projection_key, appeal_projection_key, used_warm_bytes, used_rotate_bytes, used_rehydrate_ops)))`.
- Apply deterministic carryover/decay equations to produce next tuple:
`(deficit_carry_bp, burst_credit_bp, sla_debt_bp)`.
- For each class compute:
`memory_projection_key = H(ns_cgbmpk, budget_domain_id, artifact_class, budget_seq, memory_policy_seq, memory_seq)`.
- Emit immutable `capsule_global_budget_memory_plan` with sorted class tuples and hashes:
`global_budget_memory_policy_hash`, `utilization_attestation_policy_hash`, `global_budget_memory_basis_hash`, `global_budget_utilization_hash`.

Capsule global budget arbitration planning snapshot for fixed `(budget_domain_id, tx_asof)`:
- Resolve active global budget policy + active global budget memory policy + active utilization attestation policy + active attester trust policy + active attester accountability policy + active attester adjudication policy and enumerate participating base `artifact_class` entries sorted by `artifact_class ASC`.
- For each class resolve effective memory tuple from latest visible `CapsuleGlobalBudgetMemoryRecord` by precedence:
`(budget_seq DESC, memory_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_global_budget_memory_id ASC)`, else zero tuple.
- For each class resolve effective utilization tuple from latest visible attestation/reconciliation lineage for eligible windows.
- For each class, derive deterministic demand summary from visible tier-assignment planning inputs:
`(demand_warm_bytes, demand_rotate_bytes, demand_rehydrate_ops, utility_mass_bp, utility_density_bp, deficit_carry_bp, burst_credit_bp, sla_debt_bp, used_warm_bytes, used_rotate_bytes, used_rehydrate_ops, sla_tier_rank, fair_share_weight_bp, tier_telemetry_policy_hash, utility_basis_hash, attestation_projection_key, reconciliation_projection_key, rotation_projection_key, continuity_projection_key, accountability_projection_key, reinstatement_projection_key, adjudication_projection_key, appeal_projection_key, attester_set_basis_hash, attester_continuity_basis_hash, accountability_basis_hash, reinstatement_basis_hash, adjudication_basis_hash, appeal_basis_hash)`.
- For each class compute memory-adjusted utility pressure:
`memory_priority_bp = clamp_bp(utility_mass_bp + deficit_carry_bp + burst_credit_bp + sla_debt_bp - used_share_pressure_bp)`.
- Compute:
`global_budget_basis_hash = H(ns_cgbbasis, budget_domain_id, budget_seq, memory_policy_seq, utilization_policy_seq, attester_policy_seq, accountability_policy_seq, adjudication_policy_seq, tx_asof, sorted(tuple(artifact_class, family_seq, tier_telemetry_policy_hash, utility_basis_hash, global_budget_memory_basis_hash, global_budget_utilization_hash, attestation_projection_key, reconciliation_projection_key, rotation_projection_key, continuity_projection_key, accountability_projection_key, reinstatement_projection_key, adjudication_projection_key, appeal_projection_key, attester_set_basis_hash, attester_continuity_basis_hash, accountability_basis_hash, reinstatement_basis_hash, adjudication_basis_hash, appeal_basis_hash, deficit_carry_bp, burst_credit_bp, sla_debt_bp, demand_warm_bytes, demand_rotate_bytes, demand_rehydrate_ops, used_warm_bytes, used_rotate_bytes, used_rehydrate_ops, utility_mass_bp, memory_priority_bp, utility_density_bp, sla_tier_rank, fair_share_weight_bp)))`.
- Apply deterministic floor-then-waterfill allocation for each resource dimension:
`warm_bytes`, `rotate_bytes`, `rehydrate_ops`, where waterfill tie-break key is
`(sla_shortfall_bp DESC, memory_priority_bp DESC, utility_density_bp DESC, artifact_class ASC)`.
- For each class compute:
`global_budget_projection_key = H(ns_cgbpk, budget_domain_id, artifact_class, budget_seq, arbitration_seq)` and class envelope tuple
`(allocated_warm_bytes, allocated_rotate_bytes, allocated_rehydrate_ops, fairness_debt_bp, sla_shortfall_bp, deficit_carry_bp, burst_credit_bp, sla_debt_bp)`.
- Emit immutable `capsule_global_budget_arbitration_plan` with sorted class tuples and hashes:
`global_budget_policy_hash`, `global_budget_memory_policy_hash`, `global_budget_memory_basis_hash`, `global_budget_basis_hash`, `attester_trust_policy_hash`, `attester_set_basis_hash`, `attester_continuity_basis_hash`, `attester_accountability_policy_hash`, `accountability_basis_hash`, `reinstatement_basis_hash`, `attester_adjudication_policy_hash`, `adjudication_basis_hash`, `appeal_basis_hash`.

Plan snapshot for fixed `(artifact_class, tx_asof, limit)`:
- Enumerate eligible candidates sorted by `gc_artifact_key ASC`.
- Select prefix `limit`.
- For each candidate compute:
`rehydration_manifest_hash = H(ns_rmanifest, artifact_class, gc_artifact_key, canonical_rehydration_descriptor)`.
- Compute per candidate:
`semantic_kernel_hash` for base classes, else sentinel `SK::NONE`.
- Compute:
`gc_basis_hash = H(ns_rgbasis, artifact_class, policy_seq, tx_asof, sorted(tuple(gc_artifact_key, artifact_payload_hash, rehydration_manifest_hash, semantic_kernel_hash)))`.
- Compute:
`retention_policy_hash = H(ns_rph, artifact_class, policy_seq, proof_profile_id, min_assert_age_ms, retention_floor_tx_id, policy_hash)`.
- For base classes compute class-default policy hashes:
`default_cache_policy_hash = H(ns_ccph, artifact_class, cache_policy_seq, cache_profile_id, max_serve_latency_ms, lease_floor_tx_span, eviction_profile_id, policy_hash)`,
`default_profile_policy_hash = H(ns_cpph, artifact_class, profile_policy_seq, write_codec_profile_id, write_key_epoch_seq, read_compat_set_hash, rotation_profile_id, policy_hash)`.
- For base classes with active tier family compute:
`tier_family_policy_hash = H(ns_ctfph, artifact_class, family_seq, selector_profile_id, admissibility_profile_id, cost_profile_id, tier_defs_hash, policy_hash)`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain compute:
`global_budget_policy_hash = H(ns_cgbph, budget_domain_id, budget_seq, fair_share_profile_id, sla_profile_id, global_caps_hash, class_weight_hash, policy_hash)`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain compute:
`global_budget_memory_policy_hash = H(ns_cgbmph, budget_domain_id, memory_policy_seq, horizon_profile_id, burst_decay_profile_id, sla_debt_profile_id, policy_hash)`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain compute:
`utilization_attestation_policy_hash = H(ns_cguaph, budget_domain_id, utilization_policy_seq, window_profile_id, attester_quorum_profile_id, reconciliation_profile_id, policy_hash)`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain compute:
`attester_trust_policy_hash = H(ns_cgatph, budget_domain_id, attester_policy_seq, identity_profile_id, trust_tier_profile_id, cutover_profile_id, continuity_profile_id, policy_hash)`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain compute:
`attester_adjudication_policy_hash = H(ns_cgajph, budget_domain_id, adjudication_policy_seq, jurisdiction_profile_id, verdict_profile_id, appeal_profile_id, finality_profile_id, policy_hash)`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain resolve effective per-class memory tuple from latest visible `CapsuleGlobalBudgetMemoryRecord` and compute:
`global_budget_memory_basis_hash = H(ns_cgbmbasis, budget_domain_id, budget_seq, memory_policy_seq, utilization_policy_seq, memory_seq, tx_asof, memory_tuple_hash)` and
`global_budget_memory_hash = H(ns_cgbmstate, artifact_class, deficit_carry_bp, burst_credit_bp, sla_debt_bp)`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain resolve effective utilization attestation + reconciliation tuple from latest visible records and compute:
`utilization_basis_hash = H(ns_cgubasis, budget_domain_id, budget_seq, utilization_policy_seq, utilization_window_id, tx_asof, utilization_tuple_hash)`,
`reconciliation_basis_hash = H(ns_cgurecbasis, budget_domain_id, budget_seq, utilization_policy_seq, utilization_window_id, reconciliation_seq, tx_asof, reconciliation_tuple_hash)`, and
`attester_set_basis_hash = H(ns_cgatbasis, budget_domain_id, attester_policy_seq, utilization_window_id, rotation_seq, tx_asof, attester_set_tuple_hash)`,
`attester_continuity_basis_hash = H(ns_cgatcbasis, budget_domain_id, attester_policy_seq, continuity_epoch_id, continuity_seq, tx_asof, continuity_tuple_hash)`, and
`adjudication_basis_hash = H(ns_cgajbasis, budget_domain_id, adjudication_policy_seq, utilization_window_id, adjudication_seq, tx_asof, adjudication_tuple_hash)`,
`appeal_basis_hash = H(ns_cgajappbasis, budget_domain_id, adjudication_policy_seq, utilization_window_id, appeal_seq, tx_asof, appeal_tuple_hash)`, and
`global_budget_utilization_hash = H(ns_cgbutil, artifact_class, utilization_window_id, attestation_projection_key, reconciliation_projection_key, rotation_projection_key, continuity_projection_key, accountability_projection_key, reinstatement_projection_key, adjudication_projection_key, appeal_projection_key, used_warm_bytes, used_rotate_bytes, used_rehydrate_ops)`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain resolve effective class envelope from latest visible `CapsuleGlobalBudgetArbitrationRecord` and compute:
`global_budget_basis_hash = H(ns_cgbbasis, budget_domain_id, budget_seq, memory_policy_seq, utilization_policy_seq, attester_policy_seq, accountability_policy_seq, adjudication_policy_seq, arbitration_seq, tx_asof, class_demand_tuple_hash, global_budget_memory_hash, global_budget_utilization_hash, attester_set_basis_hash, attester_continuity_basis_hash, accountability_basis_hash, reinstatement_basis_hash, adjudication_basis_hash, appeal_basis_hash)` and
`global_budget_envelope_hash = H(ns_cgbenh, artifact_class, allocated_warm_bytes, allocated_rotate_bytes, allocated_rehydrate_ops, fairness_debt_bp, sla_shortfall_bp, deficit_carry_bp, burst_credit_bp, sla_debt_bp)`.
- For each base candidate compute deterministic selector features:
`selector_feature_hash = H(ns_ctfeat, artifact_class, gc_artifact_key, capsule_id, reclaim_age_ms, pinned_key_count, payload_size_bytes, key_epoch_seq, codec_profile_id)`.
- For each base candidate gather visible `CapsuleTierTelemetryRecord` tuples from active telemetry lookback windows and canonical observer buckets.
- For each base candidate compute:
`telemetry_basis_hash = H(ns_cttbasis, artifact_class, family_seq, telemetry_seq, tx_asof, sorted(tuple(telemetry_window_id, observer_bucket_id, served_reads, cache_hits, rehydrate_ops, rotate_ops, latency_saved_us_sum, distinct_request_hashes)))`.
- For each base candidate compute deterministic anti-gaming-normalized telemetry tuple:
`(capped_observer_mass_bp, dominant_observer_share_bp, distinct_observer_count, anti_gaming_penalty_bp)`.
- For each base candidate compute deterministic telemetry-backed utility tuple:
`(utility_bp, utility_projection_key, predicted_warm_bytes, predicted_rotate_bytes, predicted_rehydrate_ops)`.
- Compute:
`utility_basis_hash = H(ns_ctubasis, artifact_class, family_seq, telemetry_seq, tx_asof, sorted(tuple(gc_artifact_key, telemetry_basis_hash, utility_bp, anti_gaming_penalty_bp, dominant_observer_share_bp, distinct_observer_count, utility_projection_key)))`.
- Compute:
`tier_basis_hash = H(ns_ctbasis, artifact_class, family_seq, telemetry_seq, tx_asof, sorted(tuple(gc_artifact_key, capsule_id, selector_feature_hash, telemetry_basis_hash, utility_projection_key, tier_id, utility_bp, predicted_warm_bytes, predicted_rotate_bytes, predicted_rehydrate_ops)))`.
- For each base candidate resolve effective member policy hashes:
from assigned tier `(cache_policy_hash, profile_policy_hash)`, else class defaults.
- For base classes compute deterministic pinned-capsule tuples:
`sorted(tuple(gc_artifact_key, capsule_id, codec_profile_id, key_epoch_seq, tier_id, cache_policy_hash, profile_policy_hash))`.
- For derived classes set sentinels:
`cache_policy_hash = CPH::NONE`, `profile_policy_hash = PPH::NONE`, `tier_family_policy_hash = TFPH::NONE`, `tier_telemetry_policy_hash = TTPH::NONE`, `telemetry_basis_hash = TTB::NONE`, `utility_basis_hash = TUB::NONE`, `tier_basis_hash = TFB::NONE`, `global_budget_policy_hash = GBPH::NONE`, `global_budget_basis_hash = GBB::NONE`, `global_budget_envelope_hash = GBEH::NONE`, `global_budget_memory_policy_hash = GBMPH::NONE`, `global_budget_memory_basis_hash = GBMB::NONE`, `global_budget_memory_hash = GBMH::NONE`, `utilization_attestation_policy_hash = GUAPH::NONE`, `utilization_basis_hash = GUB::NONE`, `reconciliation_basis_hash = GURB::NONE`, `global_budget_utilization_hash = GBUH::NONE`, `attester_trust_policy_hash = GATPH::NONE`, `attester_set_basis_hash = GATB::NONE`, `attester_continuity_basis_hash = GATCB::NONE`, `attester_accountability_policy_hash = GAAPH::NONE`, `accountability_basis_hash = GAAB::NONE`, `reinstatement_basis_hash = GARB::NONE`, `attester_adjudication_policy_hash = GAJPH::NONE`, `adjudication_basis_hash = GAJB::NONE`, `appeal_basis_hash = GAPB::NONE`, `attestation_seq = ATT::NONE`, `reconciliation_seq = REC::NONE`, `rotation_seq = ROT::NONE`, `continuity_seq = CONT::NONE`, `accountability_seq = ACC::NONE`, `reinstatement_seq = REIN::NONE`, `adjudication_seq = ADJ::NONE`, `appeal_seq = APP::NONE`, `memory_seq = MEM::NONE`, `arbitration_seq = ARB::NONE`, `tier_id = TIER::NONE`.
- Output immutable plan payload:
`artifact_class`, `policy_seq`, `tx_asof`, `retention_policy_hash`, `gc_basis_hash`, `tier_family_seq`, `tier_family_policy_hash`, `telemetry_seq`, `tier_telemetry_policy_hash`, `utility_basis_hash`, `tier_basis_hash`, `budget_domain_id`, `budget_seq`, `global_budget_policy_hash`, `global_budget_basis_hash`, `global_budget_envelope_hash`, `global_budget_memory_policy_hash`, `global_budget_memory_basis_hash`, `global_budget_memory_hash`, `utilization_attestation_policy_hash`, `utilization_basis_hash`, `reconciliation_basis_hash`, `global_budget_utilization_hash`, `attester_trust_policy_hash`, `attester_set_basis_hash`, `attester_continuity_basis_hash`, `attestation_seq`, `reconciliation_seq`, `rotation_seq`, `continuity_seq`, `memory_seq`, `arbitration_seq`, and sorted candidate tuples including effective `cache_policy_hash` + `profile_policy_hash`.

Effective cache lease state for one `(artifact_class, capsule_id, tx_asof)`:
`first(sort(visible_lease_records, key=(policy_seq DESC, lease_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, cache_lease_id ASC)))`.

Effective capsule binding for one reclaimed base `gc_artifact_key` at `tx_asof`:
- Start from retention-stub capsule binding.
- Apply latest visible `CapsuleProfileRotationRecord` tuple for that key by precedence:
`(policy_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_rotation_id ASC)`.
- Resulting effective tuple is:
`(capsule_id, codec_profile_id, key_epoch_seq)`.

Effective telemetry-backed utility for one reclaimed base `gc_artifact_key` at `tx_asof`:
- If no visible `CapsuleTierUtilityRecord` for active `(artifact_class, family_seq, telemetry_seq)`, use deterministic conservative fallback tuple:
`(utility_bp=0, anti_gaming_penalty_bp=0, utility_projection_key=UPK::NONE)`.
- Else apply latest visible utility tuple for that key by precedence:
`(telemetry_seq DESC, utility_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_tier_utility_id ASC)`.
- Utility tuple is admissible only if its source telemetry lineage satisfies active anti-gaming profile constraints.

Effective workload tier for one reclaimed base `gc_artifact_key` at `tx_asof`:
- If no visible `CapsuleTierPolicyFamily`: `tier_id = TIER::DEFAULT` and class-default cache/profile policies apply.
- Else apply latest visible `CapsuleTierAssignmentRecord` tuple for that key under active `family_seq` by precedence:
`(assignment_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_tier_assignment_id ASC)`.
- Effective member policy pair is tier-referenced `(cache_policy_hash, profile_policy_hash)` for that `tier_id`.

Effective global utilization state for one base `artifact_class` at `tx_asof`:
- If no visible `CapsuleUtilizationAttestationPolicy` for governing `budget_domain_id`: use sentinel
`(used_warm_bytes=0, used_rotate_bytes=0, used_rehydrate_ops=0, utilization_attestation_policy_hash=GUAPH::NONE, utilization_basis_hash=GUB::NONE, reconciliation_basis_hash=GURB::NONE, attester_trust_policy_hash=GATPH::NONE, attester_set_basis_hash=GATB::NONE, attester_continuity_basis_hash=GATCB::NONE, attester_accountability_policy_hash=GAAPH::NONE, accountability_basis_hash=GAAB::NONE, reinstatement_basis_hash=GARB::NONE, attester_adjudication_policy_hash=GAJPH::NONE, adjudication_basis_hash=GAJB::NONE, appeal_basis_hash=GAPB::NONE, attestation_seq=ATT::NONE, reconciliation_seq=REC::NONE, rotation_seq=ROT::NONE, continuity_seq=CONT::NONE, accountability_seq=ACC::NONE, reinstatement_seq=REIN::NONE, adjudication_seq=ADJ::NONE, appeal_seq=APP::NONE)`.
- Else apply latest visible `CapsuleUtilizationAttestationRecord` class tuple for eligible closed windows by precedence:
`(utilization_window_id DESC, attestation_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_utilization_attestation_id ASC)`.
- Overlay latest visible `CapsuleUtilizationReconciliationRecord` class tuple for the same window by precedence:
`(utilization_window_id DESC, reconciliation_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_utilization_reconciliation_id ASC)`.
- Resolve latest visible `CapsuleAttesterSetRotationRecord` tuple for target window by precedence:
`(utilization_window_id DESC, rotation_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_attester_set_rotation_id ASC)`.
- Overlay latest visible `CapsuleAttesterContinuityRecord` tuple for applicable continuity epoch by precedence:
`(continuity_epoch_id DESC, continuity_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_attester_continuity_id ASC)`.
- Overlay latest visible `CapsuleAttesterAccountabilityRecord` tuple for participating attester set by precedence:
`(utilization_window_id DESC, accountability_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_attester_accountability_id ASC)`.
- Overlay latest visible `CapsuleAttesterReinstatementRecord` tuple by precedence:
`(reinstatement_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_attester_reinstatement_id ASC)`.
- Effective tuple is admissible only if attester quorum proofs, trust-tier weighted cutover constraints, historical continuity proofs, accountability/reinstatement guards, adjudication/appeal-finality guards, portability/review-mux guards, and late-window guardrails satisfy active utilization + attester-trust + attester-accountability + attester-adjudication + attester-adjudication-portability policy constraints.

Effective global budget memory state for one base `artifact_class` at `tx_asof`:
- If no visible `CapsuleGlobalBudgetMemoryPolicy` for governing `budget_domain_id`: use sentinel
`(deficit_carry_bp=0, burst_credit_bp=0, sla_debt_bp=0, global_budget_memory_policy_hash=GBMPH::NONE, global_budget_memory_basis_hash=GBMB::NONE, memory_seq=MEM::NONE)`.
- Else apply latest visible `CapsuleGlobalBudgetMemoryRecord` class tuple by precedence:
`(budget_seq DESC, memory_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_global_budget_memory_id ASC)`.
- Effective tuple is admissible only if transition lineage conforms to active decay/carryover profile constraints.

Effective global budget envelope for one base `artifact_class` at `tx_asof`:
- If no visible `CapsuleGlobalBudgetPolicy` for governing `budget_domain_id`: use sentinel
`(allocated_warm_bytes=INF, allocated_rotate_bytes=INF, allocated_rehydrate_ops=INF, global_budget_policy_hash=GBPH::NONE, global_budget_basis_hash=GBB::NONE, arbitration_seq=ARB::NONE)`.
- Else apply latest visible `CapsuleGlobalBudgetArbitrationRecord` class tuple by precedence:
`(budget_seq DESC, arbitration_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_global_budget_arbitration_id ASC)`.
- Effective class envelope is admissible only if allocation tuple conforms to active SLA/fair-share profile constraints, active long-horizon memory tuple, and active global caps.

Cache lease planning snapshot for fixed `(artifact_class, tx_asof, limit)` under active cache policy:
- Enumerate deterministic candidate capsules from visible reclaimed base keys; sort by `capsule_id ASC`.
- Derive desired `lease_kind` per capsule:
`warm` if pinned reclaimed-key set non-empty,
`evict` only if pinned reclaimed-key set empty and eviction profile admits.
- Let `lease_seq_prev` be effective visible `lease_seq` for `capsule_id` at `tx_asof` (or `0` if none visible).
- Compute per capsule:
`pinned_key_set_hash = H(ns_ckset, sorted(pinned_gc_artifact_keys))`.
- Compute:
`cache_basis_hash = H(ns_ccbasis, artifact_class, cache_policy_seq, tx_asof, sorted(tuple(capsule_id, lease_kind, lease_seq_prev, pinned_key_set_hash, artifact_payload_hash)))`.
- Emit immutable `cache_lease_plan` with sorted tuples:
`(capsule_id, lease_kind, lease_seq, lease_expiry_tx_id, cache_image_hash, pinned_gc_artifact_keys, pinned_key_set_hash)`.
- For each tuple, `lease_seq = lease_seq_prev + 1`.

Capsule profile rotation planning snapshot for fixed `(artifact_class, tx_asof, limit)` under active profile policy:
- Enumerate visible reclaimed base keys whose effective tuple differs from active write tuple and remains in active `read_compat_tuples`; sort by `gc_artifact_key ASC`.
- Select prefix `limit`.
- For each candidate compute deterministic rotation tuple:
`(gc_artifact_key, source_capsule_id, source_codec_profile_id, source_key_epoch_seq, target_codec_profile_id, target_key_epoch_seq, artifact_payload_hash)`.
- Compute:
`rotation_basis_hash = H(ns_crotbasis, artifact_class, profile_policy_seq, tx_asof, sorted(rotation_tuples))`.
- For each candidate compute:
`rotation_projection_key = H(ns_cprotk, artifact_class, gc_artifact_key, profile_policy_seq, target_codec_profile_id, target_key_epoch_seq)`.
- Emit immutable `capsule_profile_rotation_plan` with sorted tuples and both hashes:
`profile_policy_hash`, `rotation_basis_hash`.

Capsule tier telemetry planning snapshot for fixed `(artifact_class, tx_asof, telemetry_window_id, limit)` under active telemetry policy:
- Enumerate visible canonical request telemetry rows for reclaimed base keys in closed window; group deterministically by `(gc_artifact_key, observer_bucket_id)` and sort by `(gc_artifact_key ASC, observer_bucket_id ASC)`.
- Select deterministic prefix by `gc_artifact_key ASC` then `observer_bucket_id ASC` under `limit`.
- For each grouped tuple apply canonical request-hash dedupe and deterministic counter serialization.
- Compute:
`telemetry_basis_hash = H(ns_cttbasis, artifact_class, family_seq, telemetry_seq, telemetry_window_id, sorted(tuple(gc_artifact_key, observer_bucket_id, deduped_request_hashes, served_reads, cache_hits, rehydrate_ops, rotate_ops, latency_saved_us_sum)))`.
- Emit immutable `capsule_tier_telemetry_plan` with sorted tuples and `tier_telemetry_policy_hash`.

Capsule tier utility planning snapshot for fixed `(artifact_class, tx_asof, limit)` under active telemetry policy:
- Enumerate visible telemetry aggregates across policy lookback windows and roll up by `gc_artifact_key`; sort by `gc_artifact_key ASC`.
- Select deterministic prefix `limit`.
- Apply anti-gaming normalization deterministically per key:
per-observer cap -> dominant-share check -> distinct-observer floor -> penalty computation.
- Compute telemetry-backed utility tuple and `utility_projection_key` for each key.
- Compute:
`utility_basis_hash = H(ns_ctubasis, artifact_class, family_seq, telemetry_seq, tx_asof, sorted(tuple(gc_artifact_key, telemetry_basis_hash, utility_bp, anti_gaming_penalty_bp, dominant_observer_share_bp, distinct_observer_count, utility_projection_key)))`.
- Emit immutable `capsule_tier_utility_plan` with sorted tuples, `tier_telemetry_policy_hash`, and `utility_basis_hash`.

### Reclamation and Rehydration Semantics

Admission for `apply_retention_gc`:
- Recompute active `retention_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-22`.
- Recompute `gc_basis_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-23`.
- For derived classes, validate lineage proof-profile eligibility; failure -> `CF-24`.
- For base classes, validate semantic-kernel hash/profile; failure -> `CF-26`.
- For base classes, validate referenced `BasePayloadCapsuleRecord` payload hash/codec/manifest; failure -> `CF-27`.
- For base classes with active tier family, recompute `tier_family_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-37`.
- For base classes with active tier family, recompute `tier_basis_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-38`.
- For base classes with active tier family, recompute active `tier_telemetry_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-42`.
- For base classes with active tier family, recompute telemetry-derived `telemetry_basis_hash` + `utility_basis_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-43`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, recompute `global_budget_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-47`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, recompute `global_budget_basis_hash` + `arbitration_seq` + effective class envelope hash; mismatch -> `CF-48`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, recompute `utilization_attestation_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-57`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, recompute `utilization_basis_hash` + `reconciliation_basis_hash` + (`attestation_seq`, `reconciliation_seq`); mismatch -> `CF-58`.
- For base classes, recompute effective cache member `cache_policy_hash` from resolved tier assignment (or class default if no family); mismatch -> `CF-28`.
- For base classes, recompute effective profile member `profile_policy_hash` from resolved tier assignment (or class default if no family); mismatch -> `CF-32`.
- For base classes with active tier family, validate tier selector/admissibility/member-policy integrity; violation -> `CF-39`.
- For base classes with active tier family, validate telemetry window/admissibility profile integrity and deterministic request dedupe constraints; violation -> `CF-44`.
- For base classes with active tier family, validate anti-gaming constraints on referenced utility tuples; violation -> `CF-46`.
- For base classes, validate effective capsule tuple `(codec_profile_id, key_epoch_seq)` is admissible under active `read_compat_tuples`; violation -> `CF-34`.
- For base classes under `bounded_rehydrate_latency_v1`, require visible warm `CapsuleCacheLeaseRecord` for each referenced `capsule_id` whose effective lease is active at apply boundary and whose pinned key set includes candidate `gc_artifact_key`; basis mismatch -> `CF-29`.
- For base classes with active tier family, verify deterministic per-tier cost totals remain within active bounds; overflow -> `CF-40`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, verify deterministic class/global envelope totals remain within active allocations and satisfy SLA-floor precedence; violation -> `CF-51`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, validate utilization attestation quorum/window/admissibility constraints; violation -> `CF-59`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, enforce attestation/reconciliation confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-60`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, validate late-window reconciliation grace/carry-forward bounds; violation -> `CF-61`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, recompute active `attester_trust_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-62`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, recompute `attester_set_basis_hash` + `attester_continuity_basis_hash` + (`rotation_seq`, `continuity_seq`); mismatch -> `CF-63`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, validate attester roster identity-binding, trust-tier tuple admissibility, and continuity proof payload integrity; violation -> `CF-64`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, enforce attester rotation/continuity confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-65`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, validate deterministic trust-tiered dual-quorum cutover constraints for referenced utilization lineage; violation -> `CF-66`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, recompute active `attester_accountability_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-67`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, recompute `accountability_basis_hash` + `reinstatement_basis_hash` + (`accountability_seq`, `reinstatement_seq`); mismatch -> `CF-68`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, validate deterministic slashing/decay/reinstatement admissibility constraints; violation -> `CF-69`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, enforce accountability/reinstatement confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-70`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, validate deterministic slash/decay/reinstatement transition constraints; violation -> `CF-71`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, recompute active `attester_adjudication_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-72`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, recompute deterministic `adjudication_basis_hash` + `appeal_basis_hash` + (`adjudication_seq`, `appeal_seq`); mismatch -> `CF-73`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, validate deterministic cross-domain adjudication/appeal admissibility; violation -> `CF-74`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, enforce adjudication/appeal confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-75`.
- For base classes in active global budget domain, validate deterministic appeal/finality + review-mux + review-attestation transition constraints; violation -> `CF-76`, `CF-81`, or `CF-86`.
- Enforce stub confluence by `gc_artifact_key`; divergent stub bytes -> `CF-25`.
- Admit `RetentionGcRecord` and mark candidate payload as `physically_reclaimed=true`.

Admission for `apply_capsule_tier_telemetry`:
- Recompute active `tier_family_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-37`.
- Recompute active `tier_telemetry_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-42`.
- Recompute deterministic `telemetry_basis_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-43`.
- Validate telemetry window boundaries, observer buckets, and canonical request dedupe constraints; violation -> `CF-44`.
- Admit `CapsuleTierTelemetryRecord`.

Admission for `apply_capsule_tier_utility`:
- Recompute active `tier_family_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-37`.
- Recompute active `tier_telemetry_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-42`.
- Recompute deterministic `utility_basis_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-43`.
- Validate source telemetry lineage admissibility for referenced tuples; violation -> `CF-44`.
- Validate anti-gaming normalization constraints (observer cap, dominant-share cap, diversity floor); violation -> `CF-46`.
- Enforce confluence by `utility_projection_key`; divergent utility payload -> `CF-45`.
- Admit `CapsuleTierUtilityRecord`.

Admission for `apply_capsule_profile_rotation`:
- For active tier family, recompute `tier_family_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-37`.
- For active tier family, recompute active `tier_telemetry_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-42`.
- For active tier family, recompute telemetry-derived `utility_basis_hash` for targeted keys; mismatch -> `CF-43`.
- For active global budget domain, recompute `global_budget_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-47`.
- For active global budget domain, recompute active `global_budget_memory_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-52`.
- For active global budget domain, recompute `global_budget_memory_basis_hash` + `memory_seq` for targeted classes; mismatch -> `CF-53`.
- For active global budget domain, recompute active `utilization_attestation_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-57`.
- For active global budget domain, recompute `utilization_basis_hash` + `reconciliation_basis_hash` + (`attestation_seq`, `reconciliation_seq`) for targeted classes; mismatch -> `CF-58`.
- For active global budget domain, recompute `global_budget_basis_hash` + `arbitration_seq` for targeted classes; mismatch -> `CF-48`.
- For active tier family, validate assignment + member-policy integrity for targeted keys; violation -> `CF-39`.
- For active tier family, validate telemetry lineage/admissibility and anti-gaming constraints for referenced utility tuples; violation -> `CF-44` or `CF-46`.
- Recompute effective active `profile_policy_hash` for targeted keys (tier member override or class default); mismatch -> `CF-32`.
- Recompute `rotation_basis_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-33`.
- Validate target tuple equals active write tuple and source/target tuples are admissible under active `read_compat_tuples`; violation -> `CF-34`.
- Deterministically decode source capsule bytes, verify `artifact_payload_hash`, and deterministically transcode/rewrap by `rotation_profile_id`.
- Verify deterministic per-tier rotate cost totals remain within active bounds for targeted keys; overflow -> `CF-40`.
- Verify deterministic class/global rotate envelope totals remain within active allocations and satisfy SLA-floor precedence; violation -> `CF-51`.
- Validate utilization attestation/reconciliation admissibility and quorum proofs for targeted classes; violation -> `CF-59`.
- Enforce utilization/reconciliation confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-60`.
- Validate late-window reconciliation grace/carry-forward constraints for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-61`.
- Recompute active `attester_trust_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-62`.
- Recompute `attester_set_basis_hash` + `attester_continuity_basis_hash` + (`rotation_seq`, `continuity_seq`) for targeted classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-63`.
- Validate attester roster identity/trust-tier/continuity admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-64`.
- Enforce attester rotation/continuity confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-65`.
- Validate deterministic trust-tiered cutover quorum constraints for referenced windows; violation -> `CF-66`.
- Recompute active `attester_accountability_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-67`.
- Recompute `accountability_basis_hash` + `reinstatement_basis_hash` + (`accountability_seq`, `reinstatement_seq`) for targeted classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-68`.
- Validate deterministic slashing/decay/reinstatement admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-69`.
- Enforce accountability/reinstatement confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-70`.
- Validate deterministic slash/decay/reinstatement transition constraints for referenced windows; violation -> `CF-71`.
- Recompute active `attester_adjudication_policy_hash` for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-72`.
- Recompute active `attester_adjudication_portability_policy_hash` for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-77`.
- Recompute deterministic `adjudication_basis_hash` + `appeal_basis_hash` + (`adjudication_seq`, `appeal_seq`) for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-73`.
- Recompute deterministic `portability_basis_hash` + `review_mux_basis_hash` + (`portability_seq`, `review_mux_seq`) for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-78`.
- Validate deterministic cross-domain adjudication/appeal admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-74`.
- Validate deterministic jurisdiction-weight normalization + evidence-envelope normalization + review-mux admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-79`.
- Enforce adjudication/appeal confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-75`.
- Enforce portability/review-mux confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-80`.
- Validate deterministic appeal/finality + review-mux + review-attestation transition constraints for referenced disputes/windows; violation -> `CF-76`, `CF-81`, or `CF-86`.
- Enforce confluence by `rotation_projection_key`; divergent target tuple/payload hash -> `CF-35`.
- Admit `CapsuleProfileRotationRecord`.

Admission for `apply_capsule_tier_assignment`:
- Recompute active `tier_family_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-37`.
- Recompute active `tier_telemetry_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-42`.
- Recompute deterministic `utility_basis_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-43`.
- Recompute active `global_budget_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-47`.
- Recompute active `global_budget_memory_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-52`.
- Recompute deterministic `global_budget_memory_basis_hash` + `memory_seq`; mismatch -> `CF-53`.
- Recompute active `utilization_attestation_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-57`.
- Recompute deterministic `utilization_basis_hash` + `reconciliation_basis_hash` + (`attestation_seq`, `reconciliation_seq`); mismatch -> `CF-58`.
- Recompute deterministic `global_budget_basis_hash` + `arbitration_seq`; mismatch -> `CF-48`.
- Recompute deterministic `tier_basis_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-38`.
- Validate selector feature hashes, tier member-policy references, and assignment admissibility profile; violation -> `CF-39`.
- Validate telemetry lineage admissibility for referenced utility tuples; violation -> `CF-44`.
- Validate anti-gaming constraints over referenced utility tuples; violation -> `CF-46`.
- Verify deterministic per-tier cost totals and overflow-tier fallback conformance; violation -> `CF-40`.
- Verify deterministic class/global envelope totals and SLA-floor precedence conformance; violation -> `CF-51`.
- Validate utilization attestation/reconciliation admissibility and quorum proofs for referenced classes; violation -> `CF-59`.
- Enforce utilization/reconciliation confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-60`.
- Validate late-window reconciliation grace/carry-forward constraints for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-61`.
- Recompute active `attester_trust_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-62`.
- Recompute `attester_set_basis_hash` + `attester_continuity_basis_hash` + (`rotation_seq`, `continuity_seq`) for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-63`.
- Validate attester roster identity/trust-tier/continuity admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-64`.
- Enforce attester rotation/continuity confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-65`.
- Validate deterministic trust-tiered cutover quorum constraints for referenced windows; violation -> `CF-66`.
- Recompute active `attester_accountability_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-67`.
- Recompute `accountability_basis_hash` + `reinstatement_basis_hash` + (`accountability_seq`, `reinstatement_seq`) for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-68`.
- Validate deterministic slashing/decay/reinstatement admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-69`.
- Enforce accountability/reinstatement confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-70`.
- Validate deterministic slash/decay/reinstatement transition constraints for referenced windows; violation -> `CF-71`.
- Recompute active `attester_adjudication_policy_hash` for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-72`.
- Recompute active `attester_adjudication_portability_policy_hash` for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-77`.
- Recompute deterministic `adjudication_basis_hash` + `appeal_basis_hash` + (`adjudication_seq`, `appeal_seq`) for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-73`.
- Recompute deterministic `portability_basis_hash` + `review_mux_basis_hash` + (`portability_seq`, `review_mux_seq`) for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-78`.
- Validate deterministic cross-domain adjudication/appeal admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-74`.

- Enforce confluence by `utility_projection_key`; divergent utility tuple payload -> `CF-45`.
- Enforce confluence by `tier_projection_key`; divergent tuple payload -> `CF-41`.
- Admit `CapsuleTierAssignmentRecord`.

Rehydration:
- Resolve visible retention stub for `gc_artifact_key`.
- If class is derived projection: deterministically recompute payload bytes from retained lineage/manifests.
- If class is base payload:
resolve effective capsule binding tuple from rotation precedence, resolve effective tier assignment/member policies, validate tuple in active `read_compat_tuples` (`CF-34` on violation) plus tier admissibility/member-policy integrity (`CF-39` on violation), then resolve effective warm lease for that bound `capsule_id` under effective tier cache policy; missing/stale lease under bounded profile emits `CF-29`.
- If class is base payload with valid warm lease: load deterministic payload bytes from warm cache image bound to that lease and tuple.
- Verify `H(payload_bytes) == artifact_payload_hash`.
- Hash mismatch or divergent manifest behavior emits `CF-25` (retention manifest drift), `CF-31` (lease image drift), or `CF-35` (rotation confluence drift) depending on failing hash boundary.
- Missing/divergent capsule behavior for base payload classes emits `CF-27`.

Rollback:
- Voiding a retention GC tx removes reclaim markers from visibility after void boundary.
- Logical winners/conflict outcomes remain unchanged across reclaim/void boundaries.
- Capsule records referenced by visible reclaimed base keys are pin-protected; a void that would orphan those keys is rejected by invariant gate (`CF-05`).
- Voiding a cache-lease tx reverts effective lease state by deterministic precedence; if resulting state attempts to evict a still-pinned capsule, eviction remains rejected via `CF-30`.
- Voiding a rotation tx reverts effective capsule binding by deterministic precedence; resulting binding remains subject to active profile compatibility checks (`CF-34`) and retirement guards (`CF-36`).
- Voiding a tier-assignment tx reverts effective tier/member-policy binding by deterministic precedence; resulting state remains subject to selector admissibility (`CF-39`), cost bounds (`CF-40`), and confluence protections (`CF-41`).
- Voiding telemetry or utility tx reverts effective utility lineage by deterministic precedence; resulting state remains subject to telemetry admissibility (`CF-44`), utility confluence (`CF-45`), and anti-gaming guards (`CF-46`).
- Voiding a global-budget-memory tx reverts effective per-class debt/credit state by deterministic precedence; resulting state remains subject to memory policy/basis CAS gates (`CF-52`, `CF-53`), confluence protection (`CF-55`), and transition guards (`CF-56`).
- Voiding a global-budget arbitration tx reverts effective class envelopes by deterministic precedence; resulting state remains subject to policy/basis CAS gates (`CF-47`, `CF-48`, `CF-52`, `CF-53`), confluence protection (`CF-50`, `CF-55`), and envelope/transition guards (`CF-51`, `CF-56`).
- Voiding utilization-attestation or reconciliation tx reverts effective class utilization lineage by deterministic precedence; resulting state remains subject to utilization policy/basis CAS gates (`CF-57`, `CF-58`), admissibility guards (`CF-59`), confluence protection (`CF-60`), and late-window reconciliation guards (`CF-61`).
- Voiding attester-set rotation or continuity tx reverts effective attester-trust lineage by deterministic precedence; resulting state remains subject to attester policy/basis CAS gates (`CF-62`, `CF-63`), attester admissibility guards (`CF-64`), confluence protection (`CF-65`), and trust-tier cutover guards (`CF-66`).
- Voiding attester-accountability or reinstatement tx reverts effective slashing/reputation/reinstatement lineage by deterministic precedence; resulting state remains subject to accountability policy/basis CAS gates (`CF-67`, `CF-68`), admissibility guards (`CF-69`), confluence protection (`CF-70`), transition guards (`CF-71`), and adjudication/finality/portability/disclosure/lifecycle/lifecycle-calibration/lifecycle-objective/lifecycle-signal-integrity policy-basis-admissibility-confluence-transition guards (`CF-72..CF-121`).

### Retention Invariants

- `INV-G1`: GC scope is restricted to reclaimable derived projections plus designated base payload surfaces; semantic kernels and structural records are never GC-eligible.
- `INV-G2`: Every reclaimed artifact keeps immutable audit spine fields (`gc_artifact_key`, payload hash, manifest hash, reclaim tx metadata).
- `INV-G3`: Candidate eligibility is deterministic for fixed `(artifact_class, policy_seq, tx_asof)` and admitted state.
- `INV-G4`: GC plan ordering is deterministic by `gc_artifact_key ASC`; candidate order cannot depend on arrival order.
- `INV-G5`: `apply_retention_gc` is policy-CAS gated by exact `retention_policy_hash`; stale-policy apply is rejected (`CF-22`).
- `INV-G6`: `apply_retention_gc` is basis-CAS gated by exact `gc_basis_hash`; stale candidate sets are rejected (`CF-23`).
- `INV-G7`: Derived-class candidates failing proof-profile lineage rehydratability are deterministically rejected (`CF-24`).
- `INV-G8`: Rehydrated payload bytes must hash to stored `artifact_payload_hash`; mismatch is conflict (`CF-25`), never silent overwrite.
- `INV-G9`: Retention GC is idempotent for equivalent plans; replaying same batch cannot change logical query outputs.
- `INV-G10`: Reclaim/rehydrate interleavings cannot change deterministic query outputs for equal admitted op/conflict sets.
- `INV-G11`: For one `gc_artifact_key`, divergent retention-stub payloads cannot both be admitted (`CF-25` poison).
- `INV-G12`: Retention policy cutover is non-retroactive; higher `policy_seq` affects only applies whose transactions are visible at `tx_asof`.
- `INV-G13`: Base-class candidate semantic kernel must validate against deterministic kernel profile/hash at apply boundary; mismatch is `CF-26`.
- `INV-G14`: Base-class candidates require visible matching `BasePayloadCapsuleRecord` hash/codec/manifest tuple; mismatch is `CF-27`.
- `INV-G15`: `rule_record_payload` reclaim cannot remove executable rule kernel fields (`rule_logic_hash`, `rule_dsl_ast_hash`, `rule_reliability_bp`) from hot deterministic state.
- `INV-G16`: Base payload rehydration is byte-preserving from capsule bytes only; model/generated reconstruction is forbidden.
- `INV-G17`: Visible reclaimed base payload keys must retain visible pinned capsule lineage; orphaning capsule voids are rejected as invariant violations.
- `INV-G18`: Base payload reclaim/rehydrate/rollback transitions affect only physical payload residency, never semantic query/inference outputs.
- `INV-G19`: Under bounded cache profile, base-class reclamation admission requires active warm lease coverage for each candidate capsule at apply boundary; missing/stale lease is `CF-29`.
- `INV-G20`: Capsule eviction is deterministic-pin safe: a capsule referenced by any visible reclaimed base key under active bounded profile cannot be evicted (`CF-30`).
- `INV-G21`: Cache lease transitions are policy/basis CAS-gated by `cache_policy_hash` and `cache_basis_hash`; stale transitions are rejected (`CF-28`, `CF-29`).
- `INV-G22`: Warm lease payload bytes must hash-match capsule payload hash; mismatch is explicit poison conflict (`CF-31`), never silent overwrite.
- `INV-G23`: Base reclaimed reads under bounded profile are served only from active warm lease state; fallback cold fetch paths are inadmissible for deterministic bounded-latency mode.
- `INV-G24`: Cache warm/evict/lease-rollover operations alter only latency-tier residency metadata and conflict surfaces, never logical query/inference outputs.
- `INV-G25`: Active `CapsuleProfilePolicy` selection is deterministic at `tx_asof` under `(policy_seq DESC, capsule_profile_policy_id ASC)` for each base `artifact_class`.
- `INV-G26`: Base capsule/retention/cache/rotation admissions are profile-CAS gated by exact `profile_policy_hash`; stale operations are rejected (`CF-32`).
- `INV-G27`: Capsule profile rotation is basis-CAS gated by exact `rotation_basis_hash`; stale candidate sets are rejected (`CF-33`).
- `INV-G28`: Effective capsule binding per reclaimed base key is deterministic by rotation precedence `(policy_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_rotation_id ASC)`.
- `INV-G29`: Effective capsule tuple must be admissible under active `read_compat_tuples`; inadmissible tuples are rejected as `CF-34`.
- `INV-G30`: Rotation must preserve logical payload identity: deterministic transcode/rewrap output must verify original `artifact_payload_hash`, else conflict (`CF-35`).
- `INV-G31`: Compatibility tuple retirement is deterministic and pin-safe: active policy cannot remove a tuple still referenced by visible reclaimed keys or active warm leases (`CF-36`).
- `INV-G32`: Codec/key cutover, rotation, cache, rehydrate, and rollback interleavings alter only residency/profile metadata and conflicts, never logical query/inference outputs.
- `INV-G33`: Active `CapsuleTierPolicyFamily` selection is deterministic at `tx_asof` under `(family_seq DESC, capsule_tier_policy_family_id ASC)` for each base `artifact_class`.
- `INV-G34`: Tier assignment admissions are family/basis CAS-gated by exact `tier_family_policy_hash` and `tier_basis_hash`; stale operations are rejected (`CF-37`, `CF-38`).
- `INV-G35`: Effective tier per reclaimed base key is deterministic under assignment precedence `(assignment_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_tier_assignment_id ASC)` for active family.
- `INV-G36`: Tier assignments must satisfy selector/admissibility profiles and reference visible deterministic cache/profile member policies; violations are rejected (`CF-39`).
- `INV-G37`: Tier placement must satisfy deterministic per-tier cost bounds (`max_warm_bytes`, `max_rotate_bytes`, `max_rehydrate_ops`); overflow is explicit conflict (`CF-40`), never implicit runtime demotion.
- `INV-G38`: Tier assignment confluence is deterministic per `tier_projection_key`; divergent assignment payloads cannot both be admitted (`CF-41` poison).
- `INV-G39`: Tier cutover/assignment/lease/rotation/rehydrate/rollback transitions alter only residency/profile/cost metadata and conflicts, never semantic query/inference outputs.
- `INV-G40`: Active `CapsuleTierTelemetryPolicy` selection is deterministic at `tx_asof` under `(telemetry_seq DESC, capsule_tier_telemetry_policy_id ASC)` for each active `(artifact_class, family_seq)`.
- `INV-G41`: Tier telemetry and utility admissions are policy/basis CAS-gated by exact `tier_telemetry_policy_hash`, `telemetry_basis_hash`, and `utility_basis_hash`; stale operations are rejected (`CF-42`, `CF-43`).
- `INV-G42`: Telemetry records must satisfy deterministic window/admissibility/dedupe profiles before admission; invalid telemetry is rejected (`CF-44`).
- `INV-G43`: Effective telemetry-backed utility per reclaimed key is deterministic under precedence `(telemetry_seq DESC, utility_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_tier_utility_id ASC)`.
- `INV-G44`: Utility tuples must satisfy deterministic anti-gaming normalization constraints (observer cap, dominant-share cap, diversity floor); violations are rejected (`CF-46`).
- `INV-G45`: Utility confluence is deterministic per `utility_projection_key`; divergent utility payloads cannot both be admitted (`CF-45` poison).
- `INV-G46`: Telemetry/utility/tier/cache/profile/rehydrate/rollback transitions alter only operational metadata and conflicts, never semantic query/inference outputs.
- `INV-G47`: Active `CapsuleGlobalBudgetPolicy` selection is deterministic at `tx_asof` under `(budget_seq DESC, capsule_global_budget_policy_id ASC)` for each `budget_domain_id`.
- `INV-G48`: Global budget arbitration and budget-governed retention/tier/cache/profile admissions are policy/basis CAS-gated by exact `global_budget_policy_hash` and `global_budget_basis_hash`; stale operations are rejected (`CF-47`, `CF-48`).
- `INV-G49`: Effective class envelope per `artifact_class` is deterministic under arbitration precedence `(budget_seq DESC, arbitration_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_global_budget_arbitration_id ASC)`.
- `INV-G50`: Global budget policies and arbitration payloads must satisfy deterministic admissibility constraints (valid class weight tables, valid SLA floors, supported profile IDs); violations are rejected (`CF-49`).
- `INV-G51`: Tier/cache/profile/retention transitions must remain within active class/global envelope allocations and satisfy SLA-floor precedence; violations are rejected (`CF-51`).
- `INV-G52`: Global budget arbitration confluence is deterministic per `global_budget_projection_key`; divergent allocation payloads cannot both be admitted (`CF-50` poison).
- `INV-G53`: Global budget arbitration/tier/cache/profile/rehydrate/rollback transitions alter only allocation and operational metadata/conflicts, never semantic query/inference outputs.
- `INV-G54`: Active `CapsuleGlobalBudgetMemoryPolicy` selection is deterministic at `tx_asof` under `(memory_policy_seq DESC, capsule_global_budget_memory_policy_id ASC)` for each `budget_domain_id`.
- `INV-G55`: Global budget memory and memory-aware budget-governed admissions are policy/basis CAS-gated by exact `global_budget_memory_policy_hash` and `global_budget_memory_basis_hash`; stale operations are rejected (`CF-52`, `CF-53`).
- `INV-G56`: Effective long-horizon memory tuple per `artifact_class` is deterministic under precedence `(budget_seq DESC, memory_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, capsule_global_budget_memory_id ASC)`.
- `INV-G57`: Deficit carryover, burst-credit decay, and SLA-debt repayment transitions must satisfy deterministic bounded equations under active memory profiles; violations are rejected (`CF-54`, `CF-56`).
- `INV-G58`: Global budget memory confluence is deterministic per `memory_projection_key`; divergent memory payloads cannot both be admitted (`CF-55` poison).
- `INV-G59`: Memory/arbitration rollback restores prior effective debt/credit/envelope state by deterministic precedence with no arrival-order sensitivity.
- `INV-G60`: Global budget memory/arbitration/tier/cache/profile/rehydrate/rollback transitions alter only allocation/operational metadata and conflicts, never semantic query/inference outputs.
- `INV-G61`: Active `CapsuleUtilizationAttestationPolicy` selection is deterministic at `tx_asof` under `(utilization_policy_seq DESC, capsule_utilization_attestation_policy_id ASC)` for each `budget_domain_id`.
- `INV-G62`: Utilization attestation/reconciliation and utilization-aware memory/arbitration/budget-governed admissions are policy/basis CAS-gated by exact `utilization_attestation_policy_hash`, `utilization_basis_hash`, and `reconciliation_basis_hash`; stale operations are rejected (`CF-57`, `CF-58`).
- `INV-G63`: Utilization attestation rows must satisfy deterministic window closure, attester quorum, and canonical tuple serialization constraints; violations are rejected (`CF-59`).
- `INV-G64`: Effective per-class utilization tuple is deterministic under attestation/reconciliation precedence `(utilization_window_id DESC, attestation_seq DESC, reconciliation_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, record_id ASC)`.
- `INV-G65`: Utilization/reconciliation confluence is deterministic per `attestation_projection_key` and `reconciliation_projection_key`; divergent payloads cannot both be admitted (`CF-60` poison).
- `INV-G66`: Late-window reconciliation is deterministic and bounded by policy (`reconcile_grace_windows`, `max_reconcile_delta_bp`, monotonic carry-forward lineage); violations are rejected (`CF-61`).
- `INV-G67`: Utilization attestation/reconciliation + global budget memory/arbitration/tier/cache/profile/rehydrate/rollback transitions alter only allocation/operational metadata and conflicts, never semantic query/inference outputs.
- `INV-G68`: Active `CapsuleAttesterTrustPolicy` selection is deterministic at `tx_asof` under `(attester_policy_seq DESC, capsule_attester_trust_policy_id ASC)` for each `budget_domain_id`.
- `INV-G69`: Attester-set rotation/continuity and utilization-aware memory/arbitration/budget-governed admissions are policy/basis CAS-gated by exact `attester_trust_policy_hash`, `attester_set_basis_hash`, and `attester_continuity_basis_hash`; stale operations are rejected (`CF-62`, `CF-63`).
- `INV-G70`: Attester roster identity binding, trust-tier tuple validation, and historical continuity proof checks are deterministic under active identity/trust/cutover/continuity profiles; violations are rejected (`CF-64`).
- `INV-G71`: Effective attester-set lineage per utilization window is deterministic under rotation/continuity precedence `(utilization_window_id DESC, rotation_seq DESC, continuity_epoch_id DESC, continuity_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, record_id ASC)`.
- `INV-G72`: Attester rotation/continuity confluence is deterministic per `rotation_projection_key` and `continuity_projection_key`; divergent payloads cannot both be admitted (`CF-65` poison).
- `INV-G73`: Trust-tiered dual-quorum cutover enforcement is deterministic and bounded by policy (`dual_quorum_windows`, `min_overlap_attesters`, `min_cutover_trust_weight_bp`); violations are rejected (`CF-66`).
- `INV-G74`: Attester-set rotation/continuity + utilization/memory/arbitration/tier/cache/profile/rehydrate/rollback transitions alter only operational trust/allocation metadata and conflicts, never semantic query/inference outputs.
- `INV-G75`: Active `CapsuleAttesterAccountabilityPolicy` selection is deterministic at `tx_asof` under `(accountability_policy_seq DESC, capsule_attester_accountability_policy_id ASC)` for each `budget_domain_id`.
- `INV-G76`: Attester-accountability/reinstatement and utilization-aware memory/arbitration/budget-governed admissions are policy/basis CAS-gated by exact `attester_accountability_policy_hash`, `accountability_basis_hash`, and `reinstatement_basis_hash`; stale operations are rejected (`CF-67`, `CF-68`).
- `INV-G77`: Slashing evidence rows, decay tuples, and reinstatement tuples must satisfy deterministic admissibility constraints under active fault/slash/decay/reinstatement profiles; violations are rejected (`CF-69`).
- `INV-G78`: Effective accountability tuple per attester/window is deterministic under precedence `(utilization_window_id DESC, accountability_seq DESC, reinstatement_seq DESC, tx_id DESC, record_id ASC)`.
- `INV-G79`: Attester-accountability/reinstatement confluence is deterministic per `accountability_projection_key` and `reinstatement_projection_key`; divergent payloads cannot both be admitted (`CF-70` poison).
- `INV-G80`: Slashing/decay/reinstatement transitions are deterministic and bounded by policy (slash caps, debt caps, probation windows, recovered-trust thresholds); violations are rejected (`CF-71`).
- `INV-G81`: Attester-accountability/reinstatement + attester-trust/utilization/memory/arbitration/tier/cache/profile/rehydrate/rollback transitions alter only operational trust/allocation metadata and conflicts, never semantic query/inference outputs.

### Deterministic Retention Operations

1. `upsert_base_payload_capsule(capsule_record, tx_id) -> capsule_id | rejection`
- Validate `artifact_class`, `codec_profile_id`, `key_epoch_seq`, and payload hash deterministically.
- Validate tuple admissibility against active `CapsuleProfilePolicy` read-compat set when class is currently profile-governed; mismatches are `CF-34`.
- Enforce uniqueness for `(artifact_class, gc_artifact_key, artifact_payload_hash, codec_profile_id, key_epoch_seq)`; divergent duplicates are rejected as `CF-05`.
- Admit immutable `BasePayloadCapsuleRecord`.

2. `upsert_retention_policy(policy_record, tx_id) -> retention_policy_id | rejection`
- Validate `artifact_class` and `proof_profile_id`.
- Enforce uniqueness for `(artifact_class, policy_seq)`; divergent duplicates are rejected as `CF-05`.
- Admit immutable policy record for future retention planning.

3. `upsert_capsule_cache_policy(policy_record, tx_id) -> capsule_cache_policy_id | rejection`
- Validate base `artifact_class`, `cache_profile_id`, and `eviction_profile_id`.
- Enforce uniqueness for `(artifact_class, policy_seq)`; divergent duplicates are rejected as `CF-05`.
- Admit immutable cache policy record for future retention/cache planning.

4. `upsert_capsule_profile_policy(policy_record, tx_id) -> capsule_profile_policy_id | rejection`
- Validate base `artifact_class`, deterministic codec catalog IDs, key epoch sequence, and rotation profile.
- Enforce uniqueness for `(artifact_class, policy_seq)`; divergent duplicates are rejected as `CF-05`.
- If policy removes compatibility tuples from prior active policy, require retirement guard proof that removed tuples have zero visible reclaimed-key bindings and zero active warm leases; otherwise reject as `CF-36`.
- Admit immutable profile policy record.

5. `upsert_capsule_tier_policy_family(policy_record, tx_id) -> capsule_tier_policy_family_id | rejection`
- Validate base `artifact_class`, `selector_profile_id`, `admissibility_profile_id`, and `cost_profile_id`.
- Validate each `tier_id` references visible immutable member `cache_policy_hash` + `profile_policy_hash` and includes deterministic bounded-cost limits.
- Enforce uniqueness for `(artifact_class, family_seq)`; divergent duplicates are rejected as `CF-05`.
- Admit immutable tier family policy record.

6. `plan_capsule_tier_assignment(artifact_class, tx_asof, limit) -> capsule_tier_assignment_plan | empty`
- Resolve active tier family for base `artifact_class`.
- Resolve active tier telemetry policy for `(artifact_class, family_seq)`.
- Resolve active global budget policy + active global budget memory policy + active utilization attestation policy for governing `budget_domain_id` (if present), effective class memory tuple from latest visible memory record, effective class utilization tuple from latest attestation/reconciliation records, and effective class envelope from latest visible arbitration record.
- Enumerate visible reclaimed base keys and compute deterministic selector features + telemetry-backed utility/cost tuples.
- Compute deterministic greedy bounded placement by `(tier_rank ASC, utility_bp DESC, gc_artifact_key ASC)` with required overflow-tier handling and active class/global envelope constraints.
- Compute `tier_family_policy_hash`, `tier_telemetry_policy_hash`, `utility_basis_hash`, `tier_basis_hash`, `global_budget_policy_hash`, `global_budget_memory_policy_hash`, `global_budget_memory_basis_hash`, `global_budget_memory_hash`, `utilization_attestation_policy_hash`, `utilization_basis_hash`, `reconciliation_basis_hash`, `global_budget_utilization_hash`, `global_budget_basis_hash`, `global_budget_envelope_hash`, and per-key `utility_projection_key` + `tier_projection_key`.
- Return immutable plan with sorted assignment tuples.

7. `apply_capsule_tier_assignment(tier_assignment_plan, tx_id) -> capsule_tier_assignment_id | rejection`
- Recompute active `tier_family_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-37`.
- Recompute active `tier_telemetry_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-42`.
- Recompute deterministic `utility_basis_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-43`.
- Recompute active `global_budget_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-47`.
- Recompute active `global_budget_memory_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-52`.
- Recompute deterministic `global_budget_memory_basis_hash` + `memory_seq`; mismatch -> `CF-53`.
- Recompute active `utilization_attestation_policy_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-57`.
- Recompute deterministic `utilization_basis_hash` + `reconciliation_basis_hash` + (`attestation_seq`, `reconciliation_seq`); mismatch -> `CF-58`.
- Recompute deterministic `global_budget_basis_hash` + `arbitration_seq`; mismatch -> `CF-48`.
- Recompute deterministic `tier_basis_hash` and `assignment_seq`; mismatch -> `CF-38`.
- Validate selector/admissibility/member-policy integrity; violation -> `CF-39`.
- Validate telemetry lineage/admissibility for referenced utility tuples; violation -> `CF-44`.
- Validate anti-gaming normalization constraints for referenced utility tuples; violation -> `CF-46`.
- Validate bounded-cost placement totals and overflow-tier constraints; violation -> `CF-40`.
- Validate long-horizon memory tuple admissibility/transition constraints for referenced class envelope; violation -> `CF-54` or `CF-56`.
- Validate class/global envelope totals and SLA-floor precedence; violation -> `CF-51`.
- Validate utilization attestation quorum/window/admissibility constraints; violation -> `CF-59`.
- Enforce utilization/reconciliation confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-60`.
- Validate late-window reconciliation grace/carry-forward constraints; violation -> `CF-61`.
- Enforce `utility_projection_key` confluence; divergence -> `CF-45`.
- Enforce `tier_projection_key` confluence; divergence -> `CF-41`.
- Admit immutable `CapsuleTierAssignmentRecord`.

8. `plan_retention_gc(artifact_class, tx_asof, limit) -> retention_gc_plan | empty`
- Resolve active retention policy for `artifact_class`.
 - If base class: resolve active cache/profile defaults, active tier family (if any), active global budget policy + active global budget memory policy + active utilization attestation policy + active attester trust policy + active attester accountability policy (if any), effective class memory tuple, effective class utilization tuple, effective class envelope, effective attester rotation/continuity/accountability/reinstatement tuples, and effective member policy hashes for each candidate key.
- Enumerate deterministic eligible candidates and compute `retention_policy_hash` + `gc_basis_hash`.
 - Include class-appropriate `semantic_kernel_hash`, capsule references with `(codec_profile_id, key_epoch_seq)`, effective `tier_id`, `tier_family_policy_hash`, `tier_telemetry_policy_hash`, `telemetry_basis_hash`, `utility_basis_hash`, `utility_projection_key`, `tier_basis_hash`, `global_budget_policy_hash`, `global_budget_memory_policy_hash`, `global_budget_memory_basis_hash`, `global_budget_memory_hash`, `utilization_attestation_policy_hash`, `utilization_basis_hash`, `reconciliation_basis_hash`, `global_budget_utilization_hash`, `attester_trust_policy_hash`, `attester_set_basis_hash`, `attester_continuity_basis_hash`, `attestation_seq`, `reconciliation_seq`, `rotation_seq`, `continuity_seq`, `memory_seq`, `global_budget_basis_hash`, `global_budget_envelope_hash`, `arbitration_seq`, effective cache/profile member policy hashes, and tuple admissibility metadata in candidate tuples.
- Return immutable plan with sorted candidate tuple set.

9. `apply_capsule_cache_lease(cache_lease_plan, tx_id) -> cache_lease_id | rejection`
- Recompute active `tier_family_policy_hash` when family-governed; mismatch -> `CF-37`.
- Recompute active `tier_telemetry_policy_hash` when family-governed; mismatch -> `CF-42`.
- Recompute deterministic `utility_basis_hash` when family-governed; mismatch -> `CF-43`.
- Recompute active `global_budget_policy_hash` when budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-47`.
- Recompute active `global_budget_memory_policy_hash` when budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-52`.
- Recompute deterministic `global_budget_memory_basis_hash` + `memory_seq` when budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-53`.
- Recompute active `utilization_attestation_policy_hash` when budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-57`.
- Recompute deterministic `utilization_basis_hash` + `reconciliation_basis_hash` + (`attestation_seq`, `reconciliation_seq`) when budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-58`.
- Recompute deterministic `global_budget_basis_hash` + `arbitration_seq` when budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-48`.
- Recompute effective `cache_policy_hash` (tier member override or class default); mismatch -> `CF-28`.
- Recompute effective `profile_policy_hash` (tier member override or class default); mismatch -> `CF-32`.
- Recompute `cache_basis_hash` and deterministic pinned-key set; mismatch -> `CF-29`.
- Validate tier assignment admissibility/member-policy integrity where applicable; violation -> `CF-39`.
- Validate telemetry lineage/admissibility and anti-gaming constraints where applicable; violation -> `CF-44` or `CF-46`.
- Validate referenced capsule tuples are admissible under active profile read-compat set; violation -> `CF-34`.
- Enforce monotonic `lease_seq` per `(artifact_class, capsule_id)` (`lease_seq = previous_effective_lease_seq + 1`); violations reject as `CF-29`.
- For `lease_kind=evict`, require pinned key set empty under active bounded profile; violation -> `CF-30`.
- Verify per-tier bounded warm-cost totals remain within active limits; overflow -> `CF-40`.
- Verify long-horizon memory tuple admissibility/transition constraints for referenced class envelope; violation -> `CF-54` or `CF-56`.
- Verify class/global warm envelope totals remain within active allocations and SLA-floor precedence; violation -> `CF-51`.
- Validate utilization attestation quorum/window/admissibility constraints for referenced classes; violation -> `CF-59`.
- Enforce utilization/reconciliation confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-60`.
- Validate late-window reconciliation grace/carry-forward constraints for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-61`.
- Recompute active `attester_trust_policy_hash` when budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-62`.
- Recompute deterministic `attester_set_basis_hash` + `attester_continuity_basis_hash` + (`rotation_seq`, `continuity_seq`) when budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-63`.
- Validate attester roster identity/trust-tier/continuity admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-64`.
- Enforce attester rotation/continuity confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-65`.
- Validate deterministic trust-tiered cutover quorum constraints for referenced windows; violation -> `CF-66`.
- Recompute active `attester_accountability_policy_hash` when budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-67`.
- Recompute deterministic `accountability_basis_hash` + `reinstatement_basis_hash` + (`accountability_seq`, `reinstatement_seq`) when budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-68`.
- Validate deterministic slashing/decay/reinstatement admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-69`.
- Enforce accountability/reinstatement confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-70`.
- Validate deterministic slash/decay/reinstatement transition constraints for referenced windows; violation -> `CF-71`.
- Recompute active `attester_adjudication_policy_hash` for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-72`.
- Recompute active `attester_adjudication_portability_policy_hash` for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-77`.
- Recompute deterministic `adjudication_basis_hash` + `appeal_basis_hash` + (`adjudication_seq`, `appeal_seq`) for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-73`.
- Recompute deterministic `portability_basis_hash` + `review_mux_basis_hash` + (`portability_seq`, `review_mux_seq`) for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-78`.
- Validate deterministic cross-domain adjudication/appeal admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-74`.
- Validate deterministic jurisdiction-weight normalization + evidence-envelope normalization + review-mux admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-79`.
- Enforce adjudication/appeal confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-75`.
- Enforce portability/review-mux confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-80`.
- Validate deterministic appeal/finality + review-mux + review-attestation transition constraints for referenced disputes/windows; violation -> `CF-76`, `CF-81`, or `CF-86`.
- Enforce confluence for `(capsule_id, policy_seq, lease_seq)`; divergent lease payload/image -> `CF-31`.
- Admit immutable `CapsuleCacheLeaseRecord`.

10. `plan_capsule_profile_rotation(artifact_class, tx_asof, limit) -> capsule_profile_rotation_plan | empty`
- Resolve active profile policy for `artifact_class`.
- Resolve active tier family + effective tier assignments/member profile policies when present.
 - Resolve active global budget policy + active global budget memory policy + active utilization attestation policy + active attester trust policy + active attester accountability policy (if any), effective class memory tuple, effective class utilization tuple, effective class envelope, and effective attester rotation/continuity/accountability/reinstatement tuples for rotate-cost admission.
- Enumerate deterministic reclaimed-key candidates whose effective tuple differs from active write tuple.
- Compute `profile_policy_hash`, `rotation_basis_hash`, `global_budget_policy_hash`, `global_budget_memory_policy_hash`, `global_budget_memory_basis_hash`, `global_budget_memory_hash`, `utilization_attestation_policy_hash`, `utilization_basis_hash`, `reconciliation_basis_hash`, `global_budget_utilization_hash`, `attester_trust_policy_hash`, `attester_set_basis_hash`, `attester_continuity_basis_hash`, `global_budget_basis_hash`, and per-candidate `rotation_projection_key`.
- Include deterministic per-key tier placement cost tuple for bounded rotation admission checks.
- Return immutable plan with sorted tuple set.

11. `apply_capsule_profile_rotation(rotation_plan, tx_id) -> capsule_rotation_id | rejection`
- Recompute active tier family policy hash where applicable; mismatch -> `CF-37`.
- Recompute active tier telemetry policy hash where applicable; mismatch -> `CF-42`.
- Recompute telemetry-derived utility basis hash where applicable; mismatch -> `CF-43`.
- Recompute active `global_budget_policy_hash` where budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-47`.
- Recompute active `global_budget_memory_policy_hash` where budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-52`.
- Recompute deterministic `global_budget_memory_basis_hash` + `memory_seq` where budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-53`.
- Recompute active `utilization_attestation_policy_hash` where budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-57`.
- Recompute deterministic `utilization_basis_hash` + `reconciliation_basis_hash` + (`attestation_seq`, `reconciliation_seq`) where budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-58`.
- Recompute deterministic `global_budget_basis_hash` + `arbitration_seq` where budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-48`.
- Recompute active/effective profile policy hash; mismatch -> `CF-32`.
- Recompute `rotation_basis_hash`; mismatch -> `CF-33`.
- Validate tier assignment admissibility/member-policy integrity where applicable; violation -> `CF-39`.
- Validate telemetry lineage/admissibility and anti-gaming constraints where applicable; violation -> `CF-44` or `CF-46`.
- Validate source/target tuple admissibility and target write tuple alignment; violation -> `CF-34`.
- Deterministically transcode/rewrap and verify payload hash preservation.
- Verify per-tier rotate-cost totals remain within active bounds; overflow -> `CF-40`.
- Verify long-horizon memory tuple admissibility/transition constraints for referenced class envelope; violation -> `CF-54` or `CF-56`.
- Verify class/global rotate envelope totals remain within active allocations and SLA-floor precedence; violation -> `CF-51`.
- Validate utilization attestation quorum/window/admissibility constraints for referenced classes; violation -> `CF-59`.
- Enforce utilization/reconciliation confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-60`.
- Validate late-window reconciliation grace/carry-forward constraints for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-61`.
- Recompute active `attester_trust_policy_hash` where budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-62`.
- Recompute deterministic `attester_set_basis_hash` + `attester_continuity_basis_hash` + (`rotation_seq`, `continuity_seq`) where budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-63`.
- Validate attester roster identity/trust-tier/continuity admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-64`.
- Enforce attester rotation/continuity confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-65`.
- Validate deterministic trust-tiered cutover quorum constraints for referenced windows; violation -> `CF-66`.
- Recompute active `attester_accountability_policy_hash` where budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-67`.
- Recompute deterministic `accountability_basis_hash` + `reinstatement_basis_hash` + (`accountability_seq`, `reinstatement_seq`) where budget-governed; mismatch -> `CF-68`.
- Validate deterministic slashing/decay/reinstatement admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-69`.
- Enforce accountability/reinstatement confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-70`.
- Validate deterministic slash/decay/reinstatement transition constraints for referenced windows; violation -> `CF-71`.
- Recompute active `attester_adjudication_policy_hash` for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-72`.
- Recompute active `attester_adjudication_portability_policy_hash` for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-77`.
- Recompute deterministic `adjudication_basis_hash` + `appeal_basis_hash` + (`adjudication_seq`, `appeal_seq`) for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-73`.
- Recompute deterministic `portability_basis_hash` + `review_mux_basis_hash` + (`portability_seq`, `review_mux_seq`) for referenced classes/windows; mismatch -> `CF-78`.
- Validate deterministic cross-domain adjudication/appeal admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-74`.
- Validate deterministic jurisdiction-weight normalization + evidence-envelope normalization + review-mux admissibility for referenced classes/windows; violation -> `CF-79`.
- Enforce adjudication/appeal confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-75`.
- Enforce portability/review-mux confluence for referenced projection keys; divergence -> `CF-80`.
- Validate deterministic appeal/finality + review-mux + review-attestation transition constraints for referenced disputes/windows; violation -> `CF-76`, `CF-81`, or `CF-86`.
- Enforce `rotation_projection_key` confluence; divergence -> `CF-35`.
- Admit immutable `CapsuleProfileRotationRecord`.

12. `apply_retention_gc(retention_gc_plan, tx_id) -> retention_gc_id | rejection`
- Recompute policy hash; mismatch -> `CF-22`.
- Recompute basis hash; mismatch -> `CF-23`.
- Verify proof profile lineage/capsule eligibility; failure -> `CF-24` (derived) or `CF-27` (base).
- Verify base semantic-kernel guards where applicable; failure -> `CF-26`.
- Verify base tier-family prerequisites where applicable; failure -> `CF-37`, `CF-38`, `CF-39`, or `CF-40`.
- Verify base telemetry utility prerequisites where applicable; failure -> `CF-42`, `CF-43`, `CF-44`, `CF-45`, or `CF-46`.
- Verify base global budget policy/basis/admissibility prerequisites where applicable; failure -> `CF-47`, `CF-48`, or `CF-49`.
- Verify base global budget memory policy/basis/admissibility prerequisites where applicable; failure -> `CF-52`, `CF-53`, or `CF-54`.
- Verify base utilization-attestation policy/basis/admissibility prerequisites where applicable; failure -> `CF-57`, `CF-58`, or `CF-59`.
- Verify base class/global envelope and long-horizon transition constraints where applicable; failure -> `CF-50`, `CF-51`, `CF-55`, or `CF-56`.
- Verify base utilization confluence and late-window reconciliation constraints where applicable; failure -> `CF-60` or `CF-61`.
- Verify base attester-trust policy/basis/admissibility/cutover prerequisites where applicable; failure -> `CF-62`, `CF-63`, `CF-64`, `CF-65`, or `CF-66`.
